zh.lifeSummary: Basilia Limesi是Gerard de Limesi和Amicia Bidun的女兒，於大約1160年出生在英國英格蘭。她和Hugh de Odingsells至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世在她的家鄉。

zh-hans.Belton In Rutland, Rutland, England: 英国盧特藍德貝爾頓 在 盧特藍德
zh-hans.Hereford, Herefordshire, England: 英国英格兰賀福爾賀福德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Basilia Limesi是Gerard de Limesi和Amicia Bidun的女儿，于大约1160年出生在英国英格兰。她和Hugh de Odingsells至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。她去世在她的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Limesi
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Spanish (Limés): habitational name from Limés in Oviedo province, northern Spain.

nameMeanings.name: Basilia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Pedro, Domingo, Roberto, Carlos, Ricardo, Albertino, Alejandro, Almario, Altagracia, Andres, Armando.  Portuguese Ilidio.  Italian Antonio, Gennaro, Anastasio, Federico, Marco, Quirino.
Italian; Portuguese (Basílio): from the personal name Basilio, Basílio, from Latin Basilius (see Basil ).

variants.name: Basil
meanings: From the Greek name Basileios ‘royal’ (a derivative of basileus ‘king’). This name was borne by St Basil the Great ( c.330–379 ), bishop of Caesarea, a theologian regarded as one of the Fathers of the Eastern Church. It was also the name of several early saints martyred in the East.

variants.name: Bacilio
meanings: Hispanic (mainly Mexico and Peru): variant spelling of   Basilio  .

en.lifeSummary: Basilia Limesi was born about 1160, in England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Gerard de Limesi and Amicia Bidun. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Hugh de Odingsells. She died in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Basilia Limesi est née environ 1160, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Gerard de Limesi et Amicia Bidun. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Hugh de Odingsells. Elle est décédée dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Basilia Limesi wurde um 1160 in England, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Gerard de Limesi und Amicia Bidun geboren. Sie hatte mit Hugh de Odingsells mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Basilia Limesi è nata il circa 1160 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlia di Gerard de Limesi e Amicia Bidun. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Hugh de Odingsells. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.Belton In Rutland, Rutland, England: イギリスルトランドベルトン イン ルトランド
ja.Pirton, Herefordshire, England: イギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイア
ja.Hertfordshire, England: イギリスハートフォードシュアイア
ja.Hereford, Herefordshire, England: イギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハーエフォード
ja.lifeSummary: Basilia Limesiは約1160年にイギリスイギリスでGerard de LimesiとAmicia Bidunの娘として生まれた。彼女はHugh de Odingsellsとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Basilia Limesi(은)는 대략 1160년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Gerard de Limesi(와)과 Amicia Bidun의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Hugh de Odingsells(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

mn.Hereford, Herefordshire, England: Hereford, Herefordscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Basilia Limesi nasceu aproximadamente 1160, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de Gerard de Limesi e Amicia Bidun. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Hugh de Odingsells. Ela faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Basilia Limesi родилась около 1160 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. Её родителей звали Gerard de Limesi и Amicia Bidun. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Hugh de Odingsells. Она умерла в её родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Basilia Limesi nació aproximadamente 1160, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hija de Gerard de Limesi y Amicia Bidun. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Hugh de Odingsells. Murió en su pueblo.
